card.name: White Whale
card.description: This model gains the following abilities:

granted_abilities.name: From Hell's Heart I Poke Ya!
granted_abilities.text: When this model is dealt damage by Aunty Mel, it is dealt +1 damage.

granted_abilities.name: A Gold Doubloon For Ya!
granted_abilities.text: Enemy models that initiate an opposed duel targeting this model and receive one or more raises may draw a single card instead of dealing additional damage or any other raise effect.
